title: get system health status
description: Verify that a GET request to / returns a 200 response with the current system health status without requiring authentication.

title: get all truck sensor readings
description: Verify that a GET request to /sensors returns a 200 response with a list of all truck sensor readings including current temperatures and statuses.

title: get all shipments with current status
description: Verify that a GET request to /shipments returns a 200 response with all shipment records and their current statuses.

title: post trigger breach with valid truck and temperature
description: Verify that a POST request to /trigger-breach with a valid truck_id and temperature above threshold returns a 200 response containing the AgentPipelineTrace and updates shipment status and incident data in Firebase.

title: post trigger breach with nonexistent truck id
description: Verify that a POST request to /trigger-breach with a truck_id that does not exist returns a 404 Truck not found response and does not execute the breach pipeline or change shipment data.

title: post trigger breach with database update failure
description: Verify that a POST request to /trigger-breach with valid inputs but simulated database update failure returns a 500 Database update failed response and the pipeline trace indicates partial failure.

title: post analyze unstructured with valid content
description: Verify that a POST request to /analyze-unstructured with content containing a truck identifier and temperature statement returns a 200 UnstructuredAnalysisResult, triggers the breach response pipeline, and updates incident and shipment state.

title: post analyze unstructured with malformed content
description: Verify that a POST request to /analyze-unstructured with malformed content missing truck_id or temperature returns a 200 UnstructuredAnalysisResult indicating missing or failed extraction and does not trigger or triggers fallback breach response.

title: post analyze unstructured with ambiguous or noisy text
description: Verify that a POST request to /analyze-unstructured with ambiguous or noisy text returns a 200 result with parsed values if extraction succeeds or indicates inability to identify breach inputs if extraction fails.

title: get agent trace stream for valid truck and temperature
description: Verify that a GET request to /agent-trace/stream/{truck_id}/{temperature} streams pipeline_started, agent_started, agent_completed events for each agent, and pipeline_completed event with full incident summary for valid inputs.
